_comment: Wang Family Village — Wang Lin's Childhood Home (王林故居). Per PROJECT_MASTER.md §5.2: 'Both spawn as mortal youths in Wang Family Village on Day 1.' Modest pre-massacre Wang family home reflecting their humble carpenter status (CANON_RI_COMPLETE_WORLD.md L34). Partially ruined (some blocks missing/air) per §5.1 'empty homes.' Interior: simple bed, chest, table. Hidden compartment beneath the floor (under trapdoor + dirt) containing a written_book titled 'Notes on Qi Gathering — Wang Lin's Early Scribbles' — basic cultivation manual hint seeding the player's mortal-phase exploration arc (§5.4).
name: ergenverse:wang_family_village_wang_lin_childhood_home/start_pool
